'''Alassa Major''' was a resort [[Planet/Legends|world]] located along the [[Enarc Run/Legends|Enarc Run]], known as a major tourist destination for people dwelling in the wealthy [[Core Worlds/Legends|core regions]].

==History==
Discovered by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] circa [[3000 BBY]], Alassa Major was established as a resort world, with the wealthiest of the Core escaping here to revitalize and refresh themselves. Loyal to the Republic since the world joined during the blazing of the Enarc Run, it joined the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] upon its formation from the ashes of the Republic.<ref name="Atlas" />

A rival resort to [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin's]] [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]], the planet prospered throughout the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]; though as of [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]] it, along with the entire Enarc Run had been secured by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. A member world of the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] at the end of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]], the planet was located in space controlled by [[Darth Krayt's Galactic Empire]] as of [[137 ABY]].<ref name="Atlas" />
